text: AWS Transfer Family oo @ s * Managed file transfer service - Supports transferring TO or FROM S3 and EFS ¢ Provides managed "servers" which support protocols ¢ File Transfer Protocol (FTP) - Unencrypted file transfer ¢ File Transfer Protocol Secure (FTPS) - File transfer with TLS encryption ¢ Secure Shell (SSH) File Transfer Protocol (SFTP) - File transfer over SSH * Applicability Statement 2 (AS2) - Structured B2B Data ¢ |dentities - Service Managed, Directory Service, Custom (Lambda/APIGW) * Managed File Transfer Workflows (MFTW) - serverless file workflow engine
